list.expr:
label_replace(
  max without(uid, instance) (kube_pod_start_time{pod=~"proxy-.*", namespace="default"})
  !=
  max without(uid, instance) (kube_pod_start_time{pod=~"proxy-.*", namespace="default"} offset 5m),
  "validator",
  "$1.testnet-conway.linera.net",
  "cluster",
  "gke-testnet-conway-(validator-\\d+)"
)
list.name: proxy_restart

list.expr:
label_replace(
  max without(uid, instance) (kube_pod_start_time{pod=~"shards-.*", namespace="default"})
  !=
  max without(uid, instance) (kube_pod_start_time{pod=~"shards-.*", namespace="default"} offset 5m),
  "validator",
  "$1.testnet-conway.linera.net",
  "cluster",
  "gke-testnet-conway-(validator-\\d+)"
)
list.name: shard_restart

description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Linera validator infrastructure including proxy metrics, server performance, and cluster resource utilization

panels.description: Rate of incoming requests to the proxy layer, aggregated per pod
panels.title: Proxy requests per second (averaged for the past minute)

panels.description: Percentage of failed proxy requests over 1 minute intervals

targets.expr:
(
    sum(rate(linera_proxy_request_error{validator=~"$validator", job=~"linera-linera-server|linera-linera-proxy", traffic_type=~"$traffic_type", method_name!="non_grpc"}[1m])) by (method_name)
) / (
    sum(rate(linera_proxy_request_success{validator=~"$validator", job=~"linera-linera-server|linera-linera-proxy", traffic_type=~"$traffic_type", method_name!="non_grpc"}[1m])) by (method_name)
    +
    sum(rate(linera_proxy_request_error{validator=~"$validator", job=~"linera-linera-server|linera-linera-proxy", traffic_type=~"$traffic_type", method_name!="non_grpc"}[1m])) by (method_name)
) * 100

panels.title: Proxy Error rate (1m)

panels.description: Request latency percentiles for the proxy layer over 1 minute intervals
panels.title: Proxy Latency (ms)

panels.description: Proxy request latency percentiles broken down by request type over 1 minute intervals
panels.title: Proxy Latency by Request Type (ms)

panels.description: Proxy request rate broken down by gRPC method name
panels.title: Proxy Request Rate by Request Type

panels.description: Rate of incoming requests to the validator server, aggregated per pod
panels.title: Server requests per second (averaged for the past minute)

panels.description: Percentage of failed server requests over 1 minute intervals

targets.expr:
(
    sum(rate(linera_server_request_error{validator=~"$validator", job=~"linera-linera-server|linera-linera-proxy", traffic_type=~"$traffic_type"}[1m])) by (method_name)
) / (
    sum(rate(linera_server_request_success{validator=~"$validator", job=~"linera-linera-server|linera-linera-proxy", traffic_type=~"$traffic_type"}[1m])) by (method_name)
    +
    sum(rate(linera_server_request_error{validator=~"$validator", job=~"linera-linera-server|linera-linera-proxy", traffic_type=~"$traffic_type"}[1m])) by (method_name)
) * 100

panels.description: Proxy gRPC request errors split by error_type label (gRPC status code). Empty/missing label is bucketed as `_no_label` (some scrape targets may be on older code without PR #5951/#5966).
panels.title: Proxy Errors by error_type

panels.description: Server request errors split by error_type label (qualified Rust error variant: WorkerError::, ChainError::, ExecutionError::). Empty/missing label is bucketed as `_no_label` (some scrape targets may be on older code without PR #5951/#5966).
panels.title: Server Errors by error_type

panels.description: Top 20 (method_name × error_type) pairs from server_request_error — pinpoints which gRPC method is failing with which error variant.
panels.title: Top Server Error Pairs (method × error_type)
